user.title: Add a value-crossing pair
user.description: Name this pair and pick the first sensor.

data_description.name: Friendly name for this pair; used as the prefix for its entities.

sensor_b.title: Second sensor and band
sensor_b.description: Pick the second sensor (same unit as Sensor A) and the band.

data_description.sensor_b: The second sensor; it must share Sensor A's unit of measurement.
data_description.band: Half-width of the equality band, in the sensors' unit. The pair counts as crossed when the absolute difference is at or below this value.
data_description.model: How the crossing time is estimated. Auto picks a model from the sensor type.
data_description.window: How much recent history feeds the estimate.
data_description.daily_history: Project the more dynamic sensor along its own shape from the last 24 hours instead of a short straight-line trend. Best for daily-cyclic signals like temperature.
data_description.notify: Notify when this pair crosses, optionally only in one direction. Shows a persistent notification and pushes to any targets below. The value_crossing_crossed event fires on every crossing regardless of this setting.
data_description.notify_targets: Notify entities to push the crossing to, such as your phone via the Home Assistant Companion app (notify.mobile_app_...). Leave empty for the persistent notification only.

reconfigure.title: Edit value-crossing pair
reconfigure.description: Change the sensors, band, model or window for this pair. Both sensors must share a unit.

data_description.name: Friendly name for this pair.
data_description.sensor_b: The second sensor; it must share Sensor A's unit of measurement.
data_description.band: Half-width of the equality band, in the sensors' unit. The pair counts as crossed when the absolute difference is at or below this value.
data_description.model: How the crossing time is estimated. Auto picks a model from the sensor type.
data_description.window: How much recent history feeds the estimate.
data_description.daily_history: Project the more dynamic sensor along its own shape from the last 24 hours instead of a short straight-line trend. Best for daily-cyclic signals like temperature.
data_description.notify: Notify when this pair crosses, optionally only in one direction. Shows a persistent notification and pushes to any targets below. The value_crossing_crossed event fires on every crossing regardless of this setting.
data_description.notify_targets: Notify entities to push the crossing to, such as your phone via the Home Assistant Companion app (notify.mobile_app_...). Leave empty for the persistent notification only.

error.unit_mismatch: The two sensors must have the same unit of measurement.

options.from_below: When A rises to meet B (from below)
options.from_above: When A falls to meet B (from above)
